note: UNTOUCHED holdout. None of these wordings informed the synonym table. Positives use fresh paraphrases (some with only novel metaphors the deterministic layer is NOT expected to catch — those rely on the LLM). Negatives use trigger phrases in non-cache senses to check the layer does not false-positive. Use this, not clickstack_prompts.json, to claim generalization.

prompts.text: Latency on the checkout endpoint climbed while Redis eviction counters rose.
Payment requests slowed and the cache hit ratio dropped sharply.
Connected clients on Redis spiked as response times degraded.
High memory on the cache node correlates with slower API duration.
Is the hot store shedding records while user journeys drag?
The quick-lookup layer seems to be spilling items as pages crawl.
Could the ephemeral lookup store be overflowing while orders stall?
Rotate the signing keys; key churn after the deploy locked users out.
The mocking layer for our unit tests uses an in-memory tier to stub calls.
Customers discarded entries from their shopping list before checkout.
Headroom in the sprint budget is tight this quarter.
Connection demand for the webinar exceeded the seat limit.
Reuse efficiency of the conference rooms improved after the policy change.
